options.name: <object_list>
options.description: List of nets, pins, or ports to be reported

options.name: -list_annotated
options.description: Lists the detailed information for the specified assertion types

options.name: -max
options.description: Report maximum values of the specified assertion type

options.name: -max_lines
options.description: Controls the number of output lines reported by -list_annotated or -list_non_annotated parameter

options.name: -min
options.description: Report minimum values of the specified assertion type

options.name: -min_max
options.description: Report both values of the specified assertion type

options.name: -type
options.description: Assertion type, load or transition, to be reported

options.name: -view
options.description: Reports the annotations for the specified analysis view (string, optional) > <fileName> # Writes the report to the specified file name (redirect_operator, optional) >> <fileName> # Writes the report to the specified filename
